basic_details.job_title: KEA Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) has published the Assistant Engineer Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 37 Assistant Engineer positions. Candidates within the age range of 18–40 years and holding a relevant Engineering degree are eligible to apply online at the official KEA website. The application process will be active from 21 May 2026 to 04 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. 5 years for SC/ST/Cat-1; 3 years for Cat-2A/2B/3A/3B; additional relaxations for Ex-servicemen, PwD, etc. as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Degree in Computer Science Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Bachelor degree of Engineering in Civil, Computer literate (minimum six months course in Computer basics)
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Civil) (Group-B): Degree in Civil Engineering or Technology or equivalent from recognized University and Computer literate (minimum six months course). Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) (Group-B): Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Technology or equivalent from recognized University and Computer literate (minimum six months course). Assistant Engineer (Civil) (Group-B): Bachelor degree of Engineering in Civil by a University established by law in India or equivalent. Assistant Engineer (Civil) (Group-B) (Contractual): Bachelor degree of Engineering in Civil by a University established by law in India or equivalent. Assistant Engineer (Computer Science) (Group-B): Degree in Computer Science Engineering or Technology or equivalent from recognized University and Computer literate (minimum six months course). Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) (Group-B): Bachelor Engineering Degree in Civil awarded by a University established by law in India with three years experience in relevant field.

selection_process: Competitive Written Examination (Offline OMR) Paper-1: General Paper (300 marks
2 hours) Compulsory Kannada Language Test (if applicable) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KEA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KEA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Assistant Engineer posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies announced by KEA?
faq.answer: Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) has announced a total of 37 vacancies for the Assistant Engineer posts across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies slightly by specialization but generally includes a Degree in Civil, Mechanical, or Computer Science Engineering or Technology, or an equivalent qualification. A computer literacy course is also required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Engineer posts ranges from Rs. 53,250 to Rs. 1,55,200 per month, depending on the specific post and pay scale.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Competitive Written Examination, followed by Document Verification. A compulsory Kannada Language Test may also be applicable.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. The fee varies based on the candidate's category, with different amounts for General, SC/ST/Category-1, Ex-Servicemen, and Differently Abled candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official KEA website.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for KEA Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA)?
faq.answer: The official website of Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) is https://cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea/. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply online.
